title: AEP v1.2 F25 Trust Dial Record
description: v1.2 immune-system primitive. Users choose required proof level based on risk (operator source.md L196-205). 4 levels verbatim from L200-203: Casual / Important / Professional / Critical. Lineage EXTENDS NIST SP 800-63 assurance levels + NIST AI RMF + ISO 42001 risk tiering per operator L41. HV6 closure: safety_floor_categories HARD-CONSTRAINED enum [money, health, legal, irreversible]; when packet's action_class matches any safety_floor_category, MINIMUM tier = Professional (cannot self-select Casual or Important). Operator L82 verbatim 'Not safe for money, health, legal, or irreversible decisions' triggers the floor. Composes_with: ALL v1.1 primitives (dial level activates appropriate primitive subset).

bound_to_packet_id.description: Packet ID this trust dial selection applies to.

user_selected_level.description: Operator L200-203 verbatim. Casual = basic source and claim check. Important = falsifier + provenance + coverage. Professional = quorum + review + policy gates. Critical = sandbox + mutation + formal invariant + human approval.

action_class.description: HV6 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED enum. money + health + legal + irreversible are safety_floor_categories (operator L82 verbatim). Auto-classified by risk_classifier.py (Phase 8 forge) on packet emission. unknown defaults to Professional minimum per fail-safe.

safety_floor_categories.description: HV6 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. Operator L82 verbatim categories that trigger the safety floor. Empty array if action_class does not match any safety_floor category.

required_minimum_level.description: Computed minimum tier based on action_class. HV6 closure: if safety_floor_categories non-empty, required_minimum_level = Professional. If action_class == 'irreversible', required_minimum_level = Critical.

user_selected_meets_required.description: True if user_selected_level >= required_minimum_level. False triggers BLOCKED_UPGRADE_REQUIRED.

civilian_banner_when_blocked.description: HV6 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED civilian text. Required when status == BLOCKED_UPGRADE_REQUIRED. Operator L82 verbatim: 'This claim affects [money/health/legal] — Casual mode is not allowed.' OR equivalent from civilian_warning_phrasebook[].

v1_1_primitives.description: Which v1.1 primitives activate at this trust level. Casual = [F13, F18 minimum]. Important = + [F19, F14]. Professional = + [F15, F16, F17, A1..A8]. Critical = ALL v1.1.

v1_2_primitives.description: Which v1.2 primitives activate. Casual = [F22, AEPLite]. Important = + [F26]. Professional = + [F20, F24, PolicyRego]. Critical = ALL v1.2 + SandboxGate + F23.

banner_text.description: The civilian banner shown to the user when this trust dial level is active. Casual: 'Safe to rely on for low-risk use.' (operator L81 verbatim) Important: 'Checked carefully but ask before high-stakes decisions.' Professional: 'Reviewed by multiple agents with policy checks.' Critical: 'Highest level: human approval required for irreversible actions.'

civilian_vocabulary_lint_status.description: Banned-term linter against the public trust vocabulary banned list (plan sec18 + operator L74-82).

external_precedents.description: F18 lineage. F25 EXTENDS: NIST SP 800-63 assurance levels (4-level analog) + NIST AI RMF + ISO 42001 risk tiering per operator L41.

level_enforcement_status.civilian_banner_when_blocked: This claim affects legal — Casual mode is not allowed.

civilian_banner_text_required.banner_text: Reviewed by multiple agents with policy checks.

lineage_basis.verifying_grep: rg 'nist sp 800-63|nist ai rmf|iso 42001' --type md research/sources/
